reviews.comment:

In Rosario, you'll find warm, friendly staff at the bar, who can help you find your way around the area and offer options for snacks and breakfast.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar. Buena atención. Baños públicos y baños eclusivos para socios del ACA. El buffet es cómodo para un refrigerio. Buen surtido en galletitas y golosinas. No se puede extraer dinero en efectivo con tarjeta. Los domingos se complica la carga de combustibles por demoras

(Translated by Google)
Good location. Good service. Public restrooms and restrooms exclusive to ACA members. The buffet is convenient for a snack. A good selection of cookies and candy. Cash withdrawals are not possible. Fuel loading is difficult on Sundays due to delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcThYdTFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bien todo. Fuimos tarde e igual nos atendieron rápido y  muy bien. Éramos todas chicas adolescentes y nunca nos dijeron nada, no se sobrepasaron ni intentaron nada. Muy buenos trabajadores

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great. We arrived late, but they still served us quickly and very well. We were all teenage girls, and they never said anything inappropriate, didn't overstep any boundaries, and didn't try anything. Excellent staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbFliTmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
De lunes a viernes los medio día muy buena la comida y muy rico café durante todo el día y todos los día

(Translated by Google)
From Monday to Friday, the lunchtime food is very good and the coffee is delicious throughout the day, every day.
